name: Bandit of the Brothers
overview: After refusing to become a puppet mayor under Japanese rule, merchant Fang Zhenyu is targeted by the enemy. An undercover agent recruits him to help form the Anti-Japanese United Army, leading a secret resistance in occupied Linkou Town.

trailers.title: 江湖兒女 第03集 （胡兵、陳紫函、郭珍霓主演）
